summary: Odapto Feedback Features testing completed. Backend: 17/17 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI features verified working. New logo, notification bell, board stats, card actions, profile dropdown, and Teams API all functioning correctly.
passed_tests: New logo /odapto-logo-new.png displays correctly on landing page ✓
Notification bell appears on Dashboard page with unread count badge ✓
Notification bell appears in BoardPage header ✓
Board cards in WorkspacePage show list count, card count, attachment count icons ✓
Card actions dropdown menu appears on hover with Copy, Move, Delete options ✓
Copy Card option exists in dropdown ✓
Move Card dialog opens with destination list selector ✓
Delete Card option exists in dropdown ✓
Profile dropdown includes: Profile, Integrations, Change Password, Help, Upgrade Plan, Admin Panel, Log out ✓
Teams API: get workspace teams works (GET /api/workspaces/{id}/teams) ✓
Teams API: get team details works (GET /api/teams/{id}) ✓
Board member removal: owner cannot be removed (returns 400) ✓
Board invite stores invited_by for inviter-only removal tracking ✓
critical_code_review_comments: New logo correctly referenced at /odapto-logo-new.png in all pages (BoardPage, WorkspacePage, DashboardPage)
NotificationBell component is well-implemented with polling every 30 seconds and proper mark-as-read functionality
Board stats (list_count, card_count, attachment_count) are calculated server-side and returned with GET /workspaces/{id}/boards
Card actions use proper event propagation handling with e.stopPropagation() to prevent card modal opening
Board member removal correctly tracks invited_by field and enforces inviter-only removal permission
Teams API has full CRUD operations with proper workspace scoping and ownership validation
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_Team and TEST_Card entries during testing (automatically cleaned up)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Odapto feedback features fully tested. Key test file: /app/backend/tests/test_feedback_features.py. All Teams API endpoints working. Card actions (Copy, Move, Delete) tested via UI. Board stats showing on workspace page cards. Profile dropdown has all 7 menu items. Notification bell present in both Dashboard and BoardPage.

new_logo.details: Logo at /odapto-logo-new.png displays correctly on landing page header

notification_bell_dashboard.details: Bell icon with unread count badge visible on Dashboard, popover opens with notifications list

notification_bell_boardpage.details: Bell icon present in BoardPage navigation bar alongside background picker and theme toggle

board_card_stats.details: WorkspacePage board cards display List icon (count), Square icon (cards), Paperclip icon (attachments)

card_actions_copy.details: Dropdown menu on card hover shows 'Copy Card' option

card_actions_move.details: Move Card opens dialog with destination list dropdown selector

card_actions_delete.details: Delete Card option available with red destructive styling

profile_dropdown.details: Menu includes: Profile, Integrations, Change Password, Help, Upgrade Plan, Admin Panel (for admins), Log out

teams_api_create.details: POST /api/workspaces/{id}/teams creates team with owner auto-added

teams_api_get_all.details: GET /api/workspaces/{id}/teams returns all teams in workspace with member details

teams_api_remove_member.details: DELETE /api/teams/{id}/members/{user_id} removes member (owner cannot be removed)

inviter_only_removal.details: Board member records track invited_by field; removal restricted to inviter or board owner
